name: [fornecer: nome da marca (brand_config.identity.BRAND_NAME)] -- Marketplace Listing (Channel Projection)
description: Map a canonical product into a per-channel marketplace listing payload (e.g. Mercado Livre Items API body) + a readiness report (PUBLISH-READY or NOT-READY with missing fields / warnings). Map/validate are pure; publish stays operator-gated.
